bird.name: Rapa fruit dove
bird.summary: The Rapa fruit dove (Ptilinopus huttoni) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae, which includes pigeons and doves. It is endemic to…

relations.subject: Rapa fruit dove
relations.evidence: The species was classified as Critically Endangered by the IUCN Red List in 2018 because of its small population and predicted continued decline. The Rapa fruit dove primarily feeds on fleshy fruit
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

relations.subject: Rapa fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss due to deforestation and invasive species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Rapa fruit dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss due to deforestation and invasive species
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
